=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/missingEffectServiceDependency_preview.ts(7,14): warning TS377039: Service 'Db' is required but not provided by dependencies. effect(missingEffectServiceDependency)


==== /.src/missingEffectServiceDependency_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics missingEffectServiceDependency:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    class Db extends Effect.Service<Db>()("Db", { succeed: { ok: true } }) {}
    export class Repo extends Effect.Service<Repo>()("Repo", {
                 ~~~~
!!! warning TS377039: Service 'Db' is required but not provided by dependencies. effect(missingEffectServiceDependency)
      effect: Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Db
        return { all: Effect.succeed([] as Array<number>) }
      })
    }) {}
